list.name: project
list.label: Projeto
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT project_key AS __text, project_key AS __value FROM jira_issues ORDER BY 1

list.name: board
list.label: Quadro
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT name FROM jira_boards ORDER BY 1

list.name: assignee
list.label: Colaborador
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT assignee FROM jira_issues WHERE assignee IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

list.name: issue_type
list.label: Tipo de Card
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT issue_type FROM jira_issues WHERE issue_type IS NOT NULL AND issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa') ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Cards Concluídos por Mês

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', resolved_at), 'Mon/YYYY') AS "Mês",
  COUNT(*) AS "Cards Concluídos"
FROM jira_issues
WHERE
  resolved_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
  AND project_key ~ '${project:pipe}'
  AND ('${assignee:pipe}' = '.*' OR assignee ~ '${assignee:pipe}')
  AND ('${issue_type:pipe}' = '.*' OR issue_type ~ '${issue_type:pipe}')
  AND (
    '${board:pipe}' = '.*' OR
    board_id IN (SELECT id FROM jira_boards WHERE name ~ '${board:pipe}')
  )
GROUP BY date_trunc('month', resolved_at)
ORDER BY date_trunc('month', resolved_at)

panels.description: Contagem de cards finalizados (status_category = 'done') por mês, agrupados pela data de resolução (resolved_at). Filtros de projeto, responsável e tipo de card aplicados acima.

panels.title: Story Points Entregues por Mês

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', resolved_at), 'Mon/YYYY') AS "Mês",
  COALESCE(SUM(story_points), 0) AS "Story Points"
FROM jira_issues
WHERE
  resolved_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
  AND project_key ~ '${project:pipe}'
  AND ('${assignee:pipe}' = '.*' OR assignee ~ '${assignee:pipe}')
  AND ('${issue_type:pipe}' = '.*' OR issue_type ~ '${issue_type:pipe}')
GROUP BY date_trunc('month', resolved_at)
ORDER BY date_trunc('month', resolved_at)

panels.description: Soma dos story points dos cards resolvidos por mês. Cards sem estimativa de SP são excluídos desta contagem. Use em paralelo com a contagem de cards para medir consistência de estimativas.

panels.title: Cards Criados vs Concluídos por Mês

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_trunc('month', created_at) AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS "Cards Criados"
FROM jira_issues
WHERE
  created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
  AND project_key ~ '${project:pipe}'
  AND ('${assignee:pipe}' = '.*' OR assignee ~ '${assignee:pipe}')
  AND ('${issue_type:pipe}' = '.*' OR issue_type ~ '${issue_type:pipe}')
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  date_trunc('month', resolved_at) AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS "Cards Concluídos"
FROM jira_issues
WHERE
  resolved_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
  AND project_key ~ '${project:pipe}'
  AND ('${assignee:pipe}' = '.*' OR assignee ~ '${assignee:pipe}')
  AND ('${issue_type:pipe}' = '.*' OR issue_type ~ '${issue_type:pipe}')
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.description: Criados = cards com created_at no mês (entrada na fila). Concluídos = cards com resolved_at no mês (saída). Quando 'Criados' supera 'Concluídos' consistentemente, o backlog cresce, sinal de gargalo.

panels.title: Lead Time por Mês (h)
panels.description: Lead Time = tempo entre a criação do card (created_at) e sua resolução (resolved_at), em horas. Inclui todo o tempo de espera em backlog, filas de review, QA e bloqueios. Média calculada sobre cards resolvidos no mês.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', resolved_at), 'Mon/YYYY') AS "Mês",
  ROUND(AVG(lead_time_hours)::numeric, 1) AS "Lead Time Médio (h)",
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY lead_time_hours)::numeric, 1) AS "Mediana (h)"
FROM jira_issues
WHERE
  resolved_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND lead_time_hours IS NOT NULL
  AND issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
  AND project_key ~ '${project:pipe}'
  AND ('${assignee:pipe}' = '.*' OR assignee ~ '${assignee:pipe}')
  AND ('${issue_type:pipe}' = '.*' OR issue_type ~ '${issue_type:pipe}')
  AND (
    '${outliers}' = 'incluir'
    OR lead_time_hours IS NULL
    OR lead_time_hours <= (
      SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY lead_time_hours)
      FROM jira_issues
      WHERE resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND lead_time_hours IS NOT NULL
        AND issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
        AND resolved_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    )
  )
GROUP BY date_trunc('month', resolved_at)
ORDER BY date_trunc('month', resolved_at)

panels.title: Cycle Time por Mês (h)
panels.description: Cycle Time = tempo entre a primeira transição para um status ativo (categoria 'indeterminate', ex: In Progress, Fazendo) e a resolução do card, em horas. Exclui o tempo de espera em Backlog e A Fazer (categoria 'new'). Mede o tempo real de execução após o time pegar o card.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', resolved_at), 'Mon/YYYY') AS "Mês",
  ROUND(AVG(cycle_time_hours)::numeric, 1) AS "Cycle Time Médio (h)",
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cycle_time_hours)::numeric, 1) AS "Mediana (h)"
FROM jira_issues
WHERE
  resolved_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND cycle_time_hours IS NOT NULL
  AND issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
  AND project_key ~ '${project:pipe}'
  AND ('${assignee:pipe}' = '.*' OR assignee ~ '${assignee:pipe}')
  AND ('${issue_type:pipe}' = '.*' OR issue_type ~ '${issue_type:pipe}')
  AND (
    '${outliers}' = 'incluir'
    OR cycle_time_hours IS NULL
    OR cycle_time_hours <= (
      SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cycle_time_hours)
      FROM jira_issues
      WHERE resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND cycle_time_hours IS NOT NULL
        AND issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
        AND resolved_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    )
  )
GROUP BY date_trunc('month', resolved_at)
ORDER BY date_trunc('month', resolved_at)

panels.title: Action Time vs Awaiting Time por Colaborador (h médio)
panels.description: Action Time = soma das horas em que o card esteve em status de categoria 'indeterminate' (ex: In Progress, Review, QA, Fazendo, Em andamento, configurado via JIRA_ACTIVE_CATEGORIES). Awaiting Time = Lead Time − Action Time = tempo parado em fila, backlog ou bloqueado. Razão alta de Awaiting/Action indica gargalos fora do controle do desenvolvedor.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  assignee AS "Colaborador",
  ROUND(AVG(action_time_hours)::numeric,   1) AS "Action Time (h)  ·  Fazendo · In Progress · QA · QA Feature · QA Reprovado · Review · Pronto para Produção",
  ROUND(AVG(awaiting_time_hours)::numeric, 1) AS "Awaiting Time (h)  ·  A Fazer · Backlog  (= Lead Time − Action Time)"
FROM jira_issues
WHERE
  resolved_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND action_time_hours IS NOT NULL
  AND assignee IS NOT NULL
  AND issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
  AND project_key ~ '${project:pipe}'
  AND assignee ~ '${assignee:pipe}'
  AND ('${issue_type:pipe}' = '.*' OR issue_type ~ '${issue_type:pipe}')
  AND (
    '${outliers}' = 'incluir'
    OR lead_time_hours IS NULL
    OR lead_time_hours <= (
      SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY lead_time_hours)
      FROM jira_issues
      WHERE resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND lead_time_hours IS NOT NULL
        AND issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
        AND resolved_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    )
  )
GROUP BY assignee
ORDER BY (AVG(action_time_hours) + AVG(awaiting_time_hours)) DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: Action Time Médio por Status (h)
panels.description: Tempo médio que os cards passam em cada status de categoria 'indeterminate' (trabalho ativo). Calculado a partir das transições de status: cada barra mostra quanto tempo, em média, um card fica naquela coluna do Kanban. Status com tempo alto podem indicar gargalos no fluxo de trabalho.

targets.rawSql:
WITH status_durations AS (
  SELECT
    jt.issue_key,
    jt.to_status AS status,
    jt.to_category AS category,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
      COALESCE(
        LEAD(jt.transitioned_at) OVER (PARTITION BY jt.issue_key ORDER BY jt.transitioned_at),
        CASE WHEN ji.resolved_at IS NOT NULL THEN ji.resolved_at ELSE NOW() END
      ) - jt.transitioned_at
    )) / 3600.0 AS hours_in_status
  FROM jira_issue_transitions jt
  JOIN jira_issues ji ON jt.issue_key = ji.issue_key
  WHERE ji.resolved_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    AND ji.issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
    AND ji.project_key ~ '${project:pipe}'
    AND ('${assignee:pipe}' = '.*' OR ji.assignee ~ '${assignee:pipe}')
    AND ('${issue_type:pipe}' = '.*' OR ji.issue_type ~ '${issue_type:pipe}')
    AND (
      '${outliers}' = 'incluir'
      OR ji.lead_time_hours IS NULL
      OR ji.lead_time_hours <= (
        SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY lead_time_hours)
        FROM jira_issues
        WHERE resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND lead_time_hours IS NOT NULL
          AND issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
          AND resolved_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
      )
    )
)
SELECT
  status AS "Status",
  ROUND(AVG(hours_in_status)::numeric, 1) AS "Tempo Médio (h)"
FROM status_durations
WHERE category = 'indeterminate'
  AND hours_in_status > 0
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY AVG(hours_in_status) DESC

panels.title: Awaiting Time Médio por Status (h)
panels.description: Tempo médio que os cards passam em cada status de categoria 'new' (A Fazer, Backlog) ou 'done' (aguardando deploy, etc.). Representa o tempo de espera fora do controle direto do desenvolvedor. Status com tempo alto indicam filas ou bloqueios que merecem atenção do processo.

targets.rawSql:
WITH status_durations AS (
  SELECT
    jt.issue_key,
    jt.to_status AS status,
    jt.to_category AS category,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
      COALESCE(
        LEAD(jt.transitioned_at) OVER (PARTITION BY jt.issue_key ORDER BY jt.transitioned_at),
        CASE WHEN ji.resolved_at IS NOT NULL THEN ji.resolved_at ELSE NOW() END
      ) - jt.transitioned_at
    )) / 3600.0 AS hours_in_status
  FROM jira_issue_transitions jt
  JOIN jira_issues ji ON jt.issue_key = ji.issue_key
  WHERE ji.resolved_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    AND ji.issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
    AND ji.project_key ~ '${project:pipe}'
    AND ('${assignee:pipe}' = '.*' OR ji.assignee ~ '${assignee:pipe}')
    AND ('${issue_type:pipe}' = '.*' OR ji.issue_type ~ '${issue_type:pipe}')
    AND (
      '${outliers}' = 'incluir'
      OR ji.lead_time_hours IS NULL
      OR ji.lead_time_hours <= (
        SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY lead_time_hours)
        FROM jira_issues
        WHERE resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND lead_time_hours IS NOT NULL
          AND issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
          AND resolved_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
      )
    )
)
SELECT
  status AS "Status",
  ROUND(AVG(hours_in_status)::numeric, 1) AS "Tempo Médio (h)"
FROM status_durations
WHERE category IN ('new', 'done')
  AND hours_in_status > 0
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY AVG(hours_in_status) DESC

panels.title: Lead Time Médio por Coluna do Kanban (h)
panels.description: Tempo médio (em horas) que os cards resolvidos no período passaram em cada coluna/status do Jira. Barras verdes = colunas de ação (status_category = 'indeterminate', onde o trabalho acontece). Barras amarelas = colunas de espera ('new', 'done'). Colunas de espera com tempo alto indicam gargalos no fluxo.

targets.rawSql:
WITH status_durations AS (
  SELECT
    jt.issue_key,
    jt.to_status AS status,
    jt.to_category AS category,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
      COALESCE(
        LEAD(jt.transitioned_at) OVER (PARTITION BY jt.issue_key ORDER BY jt.transitioned_at),
        CASE WHEN ji.resolved_at IS NOT NULL THEN ji.resolved_at ELSE NOW() END
      ) - jt.transitioned_at
    )) / 3600.0 AS hours_in_status
  FROM jira_issue_transitions jt
  JOIN jira_issues ji ON jt.issue_key = ji.issue_key
  WHERE ji.resolved_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    AND ji.issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
    AND ji.project_key ~ '${project:pipe}'
    AND ('${assignee:pipe}' = '.*' OR ji.assignee ~ '${assignee:pipe}')
    AND ('${issue_type:pipe}' = '.*' OR ji.issue_type ~ '${issue_type:pipe}')
    AND (
      '${outliers}' = 'incluir'
      OR ji.lead_time_hours IS NULL
      OR ji.lead_time_hours <= (
        SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY lead_time_hours)
        FROM jira_issues
        WHERE resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND lead_time_hours IS NOT NULL
          AND issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
          AND resolved_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
      )
    )
)
SELECT
  status AS "Status",
  CASE WHEN category = 'indeterminate' THEN ROUND(AVG(hours_in_status)::numeric, 1) END AS "Ação (h)",
  CASE WHEN category != 'indeterminate' THEN ROUND(AVG(hours_in_status)::numeric, 1) END AS "Espera (h)"
FROM status_durations
WHERE hours_in_status > 0
GROUP BY status, category
ORDER BY AVG(hours_in_status) DESC

panels.title: Horas Somadas por Tipo de Tempo / Mês
panels.description: Soma total (não média) de horas de Action Time e Awaiting Time de todos os cards resolvidos no mês. Action Time = horas em status 'indeterminate' (trabalho ativo). Awaiting Time = horas restantes do lead time (espera/bloqueio). Útil para medir carga absoluta do time e proporção de tempo produtivo vs ocioso.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', resolved_at), 'Mon/YYYY') AS "Mês",
  ROUND(SUM(action_time_hours)::numeric,   1) AS "Action Time  ·  Fazendo · In Progress · QA · QA Feature · QA Reprovado · Review · Pronto para Produção (h)",
  ROUND(SUM(awaiting_time_hours)::numeric, 1) AS "Awaiting Time  ·  A Fazer · Backlog  (= Lead Time − Action Time) (h)"
FROM jira_issues
WHERE
  resolved_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND action_time_hours IS NOT NULL
  AND issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
  AND project_key ~ '${project:pipe}'
  AND ('${assignee:pipe}' = '.*' OR assignee ~ '${assignee:pipe}')
  AND ('${issue_type:pipe}' = '.*' OR issue_type ~ '${issue_type:pipe}')
  AND (
    '${outliers}' = 'incluir'
    OR lead_time_hours IS NULL
    OR lead_time_hours <= (
      SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY lead_time_hours)
      FROM jira_issues
      WHERE resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND lead_time_hours IS NOT NULL
        AND issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
        AND resolved_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    )
  )
GROUP BY date_trunc('month', resolved_at)
ORDER BY date_trunc('month', resolved_at)

panels.title: Cards com QA Reprovado por Mês
panels.description: Quantidade de cards distintos que passaram pelo status 'QA Reprovado' em cada mês (baseado na data da transição). Um card que foi reprovado múltiplas vezes no mesmo mês conta apenas uma vez. Valores altos indicam problemas de qualidade na entrega para QA.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', jt.transitioned_at), 'Mon/YYYY') AS "Mês",
  COUNT(DISTINCT jt.issue_key) AS "Cards Reprovados"
FROM jira_issue_transitions jt
JOIN jira_issues ji ON jt.issue_key = ji.issue_key
WHERE
  jt.to_status ILIKE '%QA Reprovado%'
  AND jt.transitioned_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND ji.issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
  AND ji.project_key ~ '${project:pipe}'
  AND ('${assignee:pipe}' = '.*' OR ji.assignee ~ '${assignee:pipe}')
  AND ('${issue_type:pipe}' = '.*' OR ji.issue_type ~ '${issue_type:pipe}')
GROUP BY date_trunc('month', jt.transitioned_at)
ORDER BY date_trunc('month', jt.transitioned_at)

panels.title: Cards Refinados vs Não Refinados por Mês
panels.description: Comparativo mensal entre cards que foram refinados (possuem pelo menos uma subtask) e cards não refinados (sem subtasks). Considera apenas cards criados no período que não sejam subtasks/epics. Cards refinados indicam maior decomposição do trabalho antes ou durante a execução.

targets.rawSql:
WITH refined AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT sub.parent_key
  FROM jira_issues sub
  WHERE sub.parent_key IS NOT NULL
    AND sub.issue_type IN ('Subtarefa', 'Subtask', 'Sub-task')
)
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', ji.created_at), 'Mon/YYYY') AS "Mês",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.parent_key IS NOT NULL) AS "Refinados",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.parent_key IS NULL) AS "Não Refinados"
FROM jira_issues ji
LEFT JOIN refined r ON ji.issue_key = r.parent_key
WHERE
  ji.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND ji.issue_type NOT IN ('Subtarefa', 'Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Epic')
  AND ji.project_key ~ '${project:pipe}'
  AND ('${assignee:pipe}' = '.*' OR ji.assignee ~ '${assignee:pipe}')
  AND ('${issue_type:pipe}' = '.*' OR ji.issue_type ~ '${issue_type:pipe}')
GROUP BY date_trunc('month', ji.created_at)
ORDER BY date_trunc('month', ji.created_at)

panels.title: Métricas Completas por Colaborador

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(assignee, '(sem responsável)') AS "Colaborador",
  COUNT(*) AS "Cards Criados",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status_category = 'done') AS "Cards Concluídos",
  COALESCE(SUM(story_points) FILTER (WHERE status_category = 'done'), 0)::int AS "SP Entregues",
  ROUND(AVG(lead_time_hours)    FILTER (WHERE resolved_at IS NOT NULL)::numeric, 1) AS "Lead Time Médio (h)",
  ROUND(AVG(cycle_time_hours)   FILTER (WHERE resolved_at IS NOT NULL)::numeric, 1) AS "Cycle Time Médio (h)",
  ROUND(AVG(action_time_hours)  FILTER (WHERE resolved_at IS NOT NULL)::numeric, 1) AS "Action Time Médio (h)",
  ROUND(AVG(awaiting_time_hours)FILTER (WHERE resolved_at IS NOT NULL)::numeric, 1) AS "Awaiting Time Médio (h)",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status_category = 'indeterminate') AS "WIP",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status_category = 'new') AS "Não Iniciados"
FROM jira_issues
WHERE
  created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
  AND project_key ~ '${project:pipe}'
  AND ('${assignee:pipe}' = '.*' OR assignee ~ '${assignee:pipe}')
  AND ('${issue_type:pipe}' = '.*' OR issue_type ~ '${issue_type:pipe}')
  AND (
    '${outliers}' = 'incluir'
    OR lead_time_hours IS NULL
    OR lead_time_hours <= (
      SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY lead_time_hours)
      FROM jira_issues
      WHERE resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND lead_time_hours IS NOT NULL
        AND issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
        AND resolved_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    )
  )
GROUP BY assignee
ORDER BY "Cards Concluídos" DESC

panels.description: Tabela consolidada por responsável (assignee) para o período e filtros selecionados. Colunas: cards entregues, SP entregues, lead time médio, cycle time médio, action time médio e awaiting time médio (todos em horas). Action Time considera apenas status com categoria 'indeterminate' (configurável via JIRA_ACTIVE_CATEGORIES).

panels.title: Cards Concluídos por Tipo

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(issue_type, 'Outros') AS "Tipo",
  COUNT(*) AS "Cards"
FROM jira_issues
WHERE
  resolved_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
  AND project_key ~ '${project:pipe}'
  AND ('${assignee:pipe}' = '.*' OR assignee ~ '${assignee:pipe}')
  AND ('${issue_type:pipe}' = '.*' OR issue_type ~ '${issue_type:pipe}')
GROUP BY issue_type
ORDER BY "Cards" DESC

panels.description: Distribuição proporcional de cards entregues por tipo (Story, Bug, Task, Epic) no período selecionado. Subtasks são excluídas. Proporção alta de Bugs pode indicar débito técnico ou instabilidade no produto.

panels.title: Lead Time Médio por Tipo de Card (h)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(issue_type, 'Outros') AS "Tipo",
  ROUND(AVG(lead_time_hours)::numeric,   1) AS "Lead Time Médio (h)",
  ROUND(AVG(cycle_time_hours)::numeric,  1) AS "Cycle Time Médio (h)",
  ROUND(AVG(action_time_hours)::numeric, 1) AS "Action Time Médio (h)"
FROM jira_issues
WHERE
  resolved_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND lead_time_hours IS NOT NULL
  AND issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
  AND project_key ~ '${project:pipe}'
  AND ('${assignee:pipe}' = '.*' OR assignee ~ '${assignee:pipe}')
  AND ('${issue_type:pipe}' = '.*' OR issue_type ~ '${issue_type:pipe}')
  AND (
    '${outliers}' = 'incluir'
    OR lead_time_hours IS NULL
    OR lead_time_hours <= (
      SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY lead_time_hours)
      FROM jira_issues
      WHERE resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND lead_time_hours IS NOT NULL
        AND issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
        AND resolved_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    )
  )
GROUP BY issue_type
ORDER BY AVG(lead_time_hours) DESC

panels.description: Lead time médio agrupado por tipo de card. Bugs costumam ter lead time menor por urgência; Epics e Stories maiores têm lead time naturalmente mais alto pelo escopo. Compare com o cycle time para entender onde cada tipo passa mais tempo (espera vs execução).

panels.title: Backlog

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS "Backlog"
FROM jira_issues
WHERE
  status ILIKE '%backlog%'
  AND status_category = 'new'
  AND issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
  AND project_key ~ '${project:pipe}'
  AND ('${assignee:pipe}' = '.*' OR assignee ~ '${assignee:pipe}')
  AND ('${issue_type:pipe}' = '.*' OR issue_type ~ '${issue_type:pipe}')

panels.description: Total de cards com status 'Backlog'. Não inclui cards em 'A Fazer', em progresso nem concluídos.

panels.title: A Fazer

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS "A Fazer"
FROM jira_issues
WHERE
  status_category = 'new'
  AND status NOT ILIKE '%backlog%'
  AND issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
  AND project_key ~ '${project:pipe}'
  AND ('${assignee:pipe}' = '.*' OR assignee ~ '${assignee:pipe}')
  AND ('${issue_type:pipe}' = '.*' OR issue_type ~ '${issue_type:pipe}')

panels.description: Total de cards com status_category = 'new' excluindo os que estão no Backlog. São cards priorizados e prontos para serem puxados pelo time.

panels.title: WIP Geral (Ativo)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS "WIP Ativo"
FROM jira_issues
WHERE
  status_category = 'indeterminate'
  AND issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
  AND project_key ~ '${project:pipe}'
  AND ('${assignee:pipe}' = '.*' OR assignee ~ '${assignee:pipe}')
  AND ('${issue_type:pipe}' = '.*' OR issue_type ~ '${issue_type:pipe}')

panels.description: Total geral de cards em trabalho ativo (status_category = 'indeterminate'). Exclui backlog ('new') e concluídos ('done').

panels.title: WIP Ativo por Colaborador

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(assignee, '(sem responsável)') AS "Colaborador",
  COUNT(*) AS "WIP Ativo",
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - created_at)) / 3600.0)::numeric, 0) AS "Idade Média (h)"
FROM jira_issues
WHERE
  status_category = 'indeterminate'
  AND issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
  AND project_key ~ '${project:pipe}'
  AND ('${assignee:pipe}' = '.*' OR assignee ~ '${assignee:pipe}')
  AND ('${issue_type:pipe}' = '.*' OR issue_type ~ '${issue_type:pipe}')
GROUP BY assignee
ORDER BY "WIP Ativo" DESC

panels.description: WIP atual por responsável considerando apenas cards em execução ativa (status_category = 'indeterminate'). Exclui backlog ('new') e concluídos ('done').
